fixtures.description: Two-person even split with one payer and one reimbursement.
One-cent remainder is assigned away from the payer at the item level.
Final balances are rounded from aggregate exact totals, not by summing item-level rounded shares.
Percent edits lock the changed entry and rebalance remaining unlocked allocations.
Wrapped descriptions pair with quantity continuation lines.
Portuguese summary and payment footer lines are ignored with a warning.
Friendly text, numbered lines, and currency-marked lines are parsed consistently.
Clipboard summary text ordering and sentence templates.
PDF export payload for even, shares, and percent item rows.
Exact prompt and provider launch assumptions for receipt extraction.
